name: axis-specimen
title: Axis Specimen
author: Parable
description: A live variable-font specimen playground: a giant editable specimen line driven through font-variation-settings by labelled range sliders generated from an axes prop, plus size and tracking controls, preset chips, and a copy-ready CSS readout. Bring your own variable font. Idle axis "breathe" never starts under prefers-reduced-motion and presets jump instantly.
